water_norm.description: Minimum domestic water supply standard for urban areas
water_norm.priority: Domestic uses have overriding priority; in normal conditions water allocation follows: (i) Domestic, (ii) Drinking water for animals, (iii) Ecology/environment, (iv) Irrigation, (v) Hydropower, (vi) Agro-industries, (vii) Other uses
water_norm.drought_priority: In scarcity/drought, supply of water will be given first to domestic uses
water_norm.source: StateWaterPolicy-English.pdf, Section 3.1 Water Allocation Priorities, pp. 12-14

fhtc_coverage.description: Functional Household Tap Connection coverage under Jal Jeevan Mission
fhtc_coverage.interpretation: water_access_gap = fraction of HH without tap connection → reduced water supply in ABM
fhtc_coverage.source: FHTCDataTable.pdf, Jal Jeevan Mission, printed 18 Mar 2026

anna_bhagya.description: Free rice under Anna Bhagya scheme for BPL/AAY ration card holders
anna_bhagya.eligible: BPL and AAY (Antyodaya) ration card holders
anna_bhagya.note: Under NFSA 2013, AAY households get 35 kg/month at subsidised rates. Anna Bhagya tops this up with free rice for BPL.
anna_bhagya.abm_usage: BPL/AAY agents receive guaranteed rice_kg = min(pds_supply, 5 * household_size) at ₹0
anna_bhagya.source: anna_bhagya_scheme_document.pdf (scanned image; parameters from Karnataka Govt GO No. FD 01 CSM 2023, dated 10-Jun-2023)

gruha_jyothi.description: Free electricity up to 200 units/month for all domestic consumers
gruha_jyothi.eligible: All domestic consumers with one connection per household
gruha_jyothi.above_threshold_billing: Normal BESCOM tariff applies for consumption above 200 kWh
gruha_jyothi.abm_usage: If agent electricity_consumption <= 200 kWh: electricity_cost = 0; else: cost = (consumption - 200) * tariff_rate
gruha_jyothi.source: gruha_jyothi_scheeme_document.pdf (scanned image; parameters from Karnataka Govt GO No. EN 116 INL 2023, dated 18-Jun-2023)

gruha_lakshmi.description: Monthly cash transfer of ₹2000 to women heads of household
gruha_lakshmi.eligible: Women head of BPL/APL household (one per family)
gruha_lakshmi.payment_mode: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to bank account
gruha_lakshmi.abm_usage: Female-headed HH agents receive income_supplement = 2000 Rs/month; affects consumption capacity and trust
gruha_lakshmi.source: Gruha-Lakshmi scheme_document.pdf (scanned image; parameters from Karnataka Govt GO No. WCD 33 WMS 2023, dated 19-Jun-2023)

dm_response.description: State Disaster Management Policy — response triggers and standards
dm_response.seoc_activation: State Emergency Operation Centre activated 24/7 during disaster

relief_standards.temporary_shelter: Relief camps set up within 24 hours of disaster declaration
relief_standards.drinking_water: Emergency water supply arranged within 48 hours

dm_response.abm_usage: DM shock triggers emergency supply release; relief supplies supplement resource pool for persistence_months
dm_response.source: Policy Revision DM2020.pdf, Chapter 7: Relief and Rehabilitation, pp. 24-26
